texts.content: {"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 5], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "在启程之前"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 24], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我对新西兰也有一种很熟悉的想象：海湾、瀑布、雪山"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "像一张被风吹开的明信片"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但真正把车轮和镜头压进这里之后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 19], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我很快意识到，它的尺度远不止漂亮两个字"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "刚出发这个车它就坏了"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "还没来得及沉浸在目的地滤镜里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我们先在夜路、停车场和租车柜台前"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "补上了这趟旅程最现实的一课"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "从这一刻起，我就知道"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这不会是一场轻松的观光"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "它更像一次必须亲身完成的现场验证"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 6], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我一直想知道"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这个被无数旅行清单反复提起的国家"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "究竟只是镜头里的风景"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "还是一整套必须用身体去理解的空间"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 7], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "落地奥克兰之后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 28], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "城市天际线、港口和跨海大桥很快把这种想象拉成了具体的路感"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "你得一边重新适应左舵自驾"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "一边判断天气、时间和机位"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 9], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "才算真正进入新西兰"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "北岛并没有按单一的风景逻辑展开"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "离开城市之后，地貌几乎在不停换面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "从罗托鲁瓦的地热蒸汽"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 24], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "到陶波一带的湖岸、公路和不断出现的环岛与开阔天空"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "你会很快失去对它的单一判断"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而到了海岸悬崖和塘鹅栖地"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 21], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这条路线又突然把北岛推向了另一种更野的边缘"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 20], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "真正把这趟片子的尺度彻底抬起来的，是南岛"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 24], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "塔斯曼冰川、库克山附近的雪线和特卡波湖的冷色水面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "先把空间拉到足够辽阔"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 3], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "再往后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 19], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "米尔福德峡湾的山体和漫长弯曲的进场公路"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "会把这份辽阔继续推成压迫感"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 26], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "等车轮继续掠过瓦卡蒂普湖、瓦纳卡和那些横跨河谷的桥梁"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "你会慢慢意识到，这不是几处名景的叠加"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是一整片大陆级地形在不断逼近你"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "所以，这支片子真正想记录的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "并不只是新西兰有多好看"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是当我亲自穿过它的时候"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "风景、路况、距离和意外"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "怎样一起改写了最初的想象"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 3], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "接下来"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "就跟着我从北岛一路进入南岛"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "去看这场穿越究竟怎样展开"}
